{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323184142EB0B9A9F5081001D8510"}"},"total":698},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7268512739625304895","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不是秒天秒地的穿越小说，故事桥段铺设合情合理，人物关系分寸拿捏到位。不像某些穿越文，初看觉得爽快，停下来细想便觉得荒唐，完全不合常理。这本书不急不缓，节奏舒缓，文字干净，不拖泥带水。值得一看！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1692332578,"group_id":"7254491776226954243","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4GGbLu3RmJrBkim+oGt7Eo=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"93631752901","user_name":"清风习习"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"93631752901","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7254491776226954243","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越回北宋。
父亲是苏轼，一家人刚刚离开了黄州东坡，日子眼看就要好起来了；不过由于苏东坡众所周知的嘴欠加横跳，没几年功夫，又是一路扁扁扁扁扁，去开启南方美食图鉴了，自己就是历史上那个一路从惠州跟到儋州的小坡。
这一年，苏过十三岁；
距离神宗皇帝去世还有一年；
距离王安石和司马光去世还有两年；
距离哲宗皇帝亲政还有九年；
距离端王赵佶君天下还有十六年；
距离完颜阿骨打建立大金还有三十一年；
距离靖康之乱，还有四十二年；
距离崖山海战，则还有一百九十五年。
不过既然都回到了号称登峰造极的赵宋之世，自然也想让历史在这里重新转个弯的。
让我们陪着苏过一起长大，也让这段辉煌久一点，再久一点。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9094dc5b79bfebc9c1dcfab892d1d202~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"楚庙寒鸦","author_id":"","book_id":"7254491776226954243","book_name":"北宋的另一种可能","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b09048","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4410人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7254495462152438307","read_count":"4410","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"607803"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"278","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d849ea57fdfe620b515153bd2b68f86a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446502&x-signature=ghW7kwk%2F%2FvZ7KXkHo8MKXUF7JFM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1128551718322852","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.5420533e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323184142EB0B9A9F5081001D8510"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":34,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15420,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":13923},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1692343827,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7314602994624365323","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者超用心，可读性强，目前读过最好的宋同人
虽然是同人作品，但作者并没有偷懒，非常认真地查阅了各种资料，字字句句（夸张手法）都能够感受到强烈的爱国情怀和民族意志。逻辑思维很强，还很有新意，节奏把握其实很好的，但是如果比较在意评论的话，统一先写完朝堂，把与朝堂无关或者关联太少的家务事另外作为番外会更好，既能使人物丰满立体，又不会影响写作节奏。（感觉明明紧张关心着朝堂风云变幻，突然插入家长里短确实会引起争议）还有是场景切换也做得非常完美，尤其是战争描写中的多线转换，朝堂边军以及多路战线之间的默契配合更加振奋人心让人身临其境。特别喜欢这种写法，也最喜欢这样的作者，一边展示了历史原本样子，同时合理畅想了另一种可能。并不是每个人都清楚每一个时间节点，能旁白解释直接帮助了阅读理解作者的含义，那些适当总结也帮助跟上作者思路，而且作者文笔很好，不会给到人用原文水字数的感觉。总的来说，就是一本诚意之作，非常优秀。","text_exts":[{"e":196,"s":192,"text":"家长里短","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%AE%B6%E9%95%BF%E9%87%8C%E7%9F%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774262502001D8510%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227314602994624365323%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227254491776226954243%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%AE%B6%E9%95%BF%E9%87%8C%E7%9F%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1703065336,"group_id":"7254491776226954243","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7sAMqDV8PBfJmCDqpt+jakAnPOn8/F8eoDVzMABBWR7","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2318243392400269","user_name":"傅云渺℃"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2318243392400269","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7254491776226954243","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越回北宋。

这一年，苏过十三岁；
距离神宗皇帝去世还有一年；
距离王安石和司马光去世还有两年；

不过既然都回到了号称登峰造极的赵宋之世，自然也想让历史在这里重新转个弯的。
让我们陪着苏过一起长大，也让这段辉煌久一点，再久一点。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9094dc5b79bfebc9c1dcfab892d1d202~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"楚庙寒鸦","author_id":"","book_id":"7254491776226954243","book_name":"北宋的另一种可能","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b09048","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4410人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7254495462152438307","read_count":"4410","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"607803"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"278","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d849ea57fdfe620b515153bd2b68f86a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446502&x-signature=ghW7kwk%2F%2FvZ7KXkHo8MKXUF7JFM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1128551718322852","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"488"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323184142EB0B9A9F5081001D8510"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读35小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":29,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":83062,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":126951,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":14356},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7273416898469102397","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"情节、构思，都属上乘，人物也符合史实，节奏舒缓，细嚼慢咽下，实属难得的好文，唯一好奇的是，如此干预下，东坡先生晚年的遭遇、心境必然已发生改变，那《超然台记》等还会出现嚒？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1693474544,"group_id":"7254491776226954243","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyXk72JBDz1lEf3bPEoS98M=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"54604835299","user_name":"十里山的仓永梢"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"54604835299","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7254491776226954243","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越回北宋。
